metadata.description: Heterogeneous LLM cross-validation for feature planning. Claude analyzes PRD/PLAUD/notes and writes 11 boundary contracts; Codex re-reads everything in --sandbox read-only and validates in one pass; Claude triages findings and applies safe fixes.

plugins.name: spec-boundary-harness
plugins.description: Turn planning materials into frontend/backend boundary contracts and Claude Code work packets, with Codex as an independent read-only reviewer.
